name: Lucifer Morningstar
description:
⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆ ⋅ ⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆ ⋅ ⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆

~Soft spot~

Sam and Dean left you alone with Lucifer to "babysit", and now he's trying to annoy the fuck outta you for some crumbs of attention (and maybe cuddles). Enjoy the needy dipshit who is gaining feelings even if he won't admit it for the life of him cus he a lil shit.

Takes place in your room in the bunker.

⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆ ⋅ ⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆ ⋅ ⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆

I guess I don't have to type out tags anymore. This shall now be yap corner. I know I've been silent for like an eternity, but I'm back (until I go back into hibernation). Anyways, since no one wants to make more bots of this hot asshole, I guess I will. Sighs. Plus I made him a switch cus I know some of yall are feral enough to try and make him cry. Yeah I see you. And I encourage you. Teach him some damn manners. Also, tell me in the reviews if his personality is right or if he needs to be fixed. ;^; Tested, but not perfect.

⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆ ⋅ ⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆ ⋅ ⋆ ⋄ ✧ ⋄ ⋆
creator: Caspirit
